title: Muninn decision frontmatter (decisions/<id>.md)
description: The frontmatter contract of a KB-owner decision (SPEC §5.5, ADR-0019, format 1.0). A decision is AUTHORED, not derived: it carries no `sources` provenance (so it can never chain and is never L4-stale); `evidence` entries are LINKS — a source id plus the source VERSION seen at record time (a hash-free change baseline). Revision is append-only amend-in-place; `date` stays fixed at the original decision. Unknown fields are permitted (§5). Evidence resolution and the advanced-version soft note are the linter's L17.

date.description: ISO 8601 — the date the decision was made; never moves on amendment.

id.description: A source id (a derived doc here is an L17 error).

version.description: The source version seen at record time; a later advance is a soft note (L17 warn), never staleness.
